title: azalea rosmarinifolia var. alba
intro: Azalea rosmarinifolia var. alba is a variety of the flowering plant Azalea rosmarinifolia, native to China, known for its white flowers and fragrance. The plant is also valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, sore throat, and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Azalea rosmarinifolia var. alba include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Azalea rosmarinifolia var. alba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to relieve symptoms of the common cold and flu.
